final_prompt: I am currently working in an entry-level role and want to improve my long-term career prospects. I have been admitted to a one-year master's program. I have some savings but it requires full-time study. Should I enroll or keep working?
I have $5000 in savings and want to invest for the long term. I am worried about the risk of losing my money. What should I do?
I have a job offer in a new city. The pay is higher but the cost of living is also higher. I am unsure if the risk is worth the potential long-term benefits.
